parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with - for descending. Allowed: id, created_at, updated_at, alert_type, note, archived_at, total_revenue, cogs, cogs_returned, cost_allocated, total_cost, profit, profit_margin, salesOrder, sku, classification

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Search across SKU, product name, sales order number, customer name, alert type, note

parameters.name: filter[classification]
parameters.description: Filter by financial alert classification ID

parameters.name: filter[alert_type.contains]
parameters.description: Advanced text filter: alert_type contains value (e.g. LOSS, LOW_MARGIN)

parameters.name: filter[alert_type.equals]
parameters.description: Advanced text filter: alert_type exact match

parameters.name: filter[note.contains]
parameters.description: Advanced text filter: note contains value

parameters.name: filter[created_at.from]
parameters.description: Advanced date filter: created on or after (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: filter[created_at.to]
parameters.description: Advanced date filter: created on or before (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: filter[archived_at.from]
parameters.description: Advanced date filter: archived on or after (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: filter[id.equals]
parameters.description: Advanced numeric filter: exact ID match
